Fact.Name: Show tax year change confirmation
Fact.Description: Set in the browser when the user selects a different tax year and must confirm clearing prior answers. Pending year is stored in /flowPendingChosenTaxYear.

Fact.Name: Pending tax year after destructive change request
Fact.Description: Enum value the user chose; applied on Continue after reset.

Fact.Name: Show MFJ to non-MFJ QC clear confirmation
Fact.Description: Set when an under-24 filer with qualifying children changes from MFJ to another status. Pending status is stored in /flowPendingInitialFilingStatus.

Fact.Name: Pending filing status after MFJ clear request
Fact.Description: Filing status enum to apply on Continue after clearing qualifying children.
